generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our reliance on foreign tech for critical infrastructure puts our national security at risk? Just last year, a major power grid failure was traced back to a vulnerability in imported systems. We can't afford to be complacent. It's time to prioritize strategic autonomy and invest in domestic innovation. #NationalSecurity #TechIndependence
